title: viola arvensis var. arvatica
intro: Viola arvensis var. arvatica, also known as the field pansy or meadow pansy, is a subspecies of perennial flowering plant in the viola genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Viola arvensis var. arvatica include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a variety of ailments.
